name: ontrac-driver-checkin
description: OnTrac Driver Check-In System — SOC 2 compliant barcode-based driver admission management

scripts.dev: concurrently --prefix-colors "bgBlue.bold,bgRed.bold" --prefix "[{name}]" --names "backend,frontend" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.start:prod: cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run start --prefix backend
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
